prompt: Hero has AhQh on Kc7h2h. How many outs improve hero to a flush on the turn?
intro_v1: Count the improving cards you can see a path to. Start from the cards and board, not from abstract math.
why_v1: With four hearts visible, 9 unseen hearts still improve hero to a flush.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Four hearts are already visible, so 9 unseen hearts still make the flush.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This flush draw has 9 outs because four hearts are already visible.
